get.description: Upgrades the HTTP connection to a WebSocket and streams latest ticker price updates as JSON messages. This endpoint is documented manually because WebSocket upgrade routes are not generated from protobuf HTTP annotations.

parameters.name: exchange
parameters.description: Numeric exchange identifier from the Exchange enum, for example 1 for Tokocrypto or 2 for Binance.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Trading pair symbol, for example BTC/USDT.

101.description: Switching Protocols. After upgrade, the server sends PriceStreamMessage JSON text frames.

500.description: WebSocket upgrade or exchange streaming error.

PriceStreamMessage.description: JSON message sent on the WebSocket stream for each latest ticker price update.

WebSocketErrorMessage.description: JSON error message sent before the WebSocket connection is closed when streaming cannot continue.
